text.value: Laboratory Report
Laboratory studies

Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma
INR in Platelet poor plasma by Coagulation assay

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows hypoxemia, anemia, leukopenia with neutropenia and lymphopenia, mild thrombocytopenia, elevated creatinine (suggesting renal impairment), hyperbilirubinemia, low total protein, elevated ferritin, and increased INR. These findings indicate multi-organ dysfunction, likely involving renal and hepatic impairment, with possible underlying infection or inflammation. Immediate clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.

text.value: Kristina Pocius

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

text.value: Oxygen saturation in Arterial blood
